news.headline: YouTuber held for ‘recruiting individuals for al-Qaeda’
news.summary:

news.headline: Millions of jobs lost as Iranians battle ‘Operation Economic Fury’
news.summary: A fragile ceasefire may have paused the US-Israeli war on Iran, but the economic cost is crippling life in Tehran.

news.headline: How Hong Kong’s 91-year-old Haw Par Mansion will transform into new cultural hub
news.summary:
Perched above the streets of Tai Hang, the 91-year-old Haw Par Mansion has stood as a watchman to Hong Kong’s evolving history.

news.headline: Property management sector cites 25% guard shortage amid imported labour backlash
news.summary:
Industry leaders from Hong Kong’s property management sector have said a security staff shortfall of up to 25 per cent persists, as they defended a major housing estate’s recruitment of one-third of its guards from across the border.

news.headline: US approves $8.6bn in arms sales to Middle East allies
news.summary: US State Department cites emergency circumstances to fast-track sales without the approval of Congress.

news.headline: Norway’s Northern Lights Nightmare
news.summary: This Arctic region has seen a boom in tourism, but as tourists chase the northern lights, scammers chase their money.

news.headline: An Insurgency Threatens U.S. Mining Ambitions in Pakistan
news.summary: Attacks by the Baloch Liberation Army could derail Pakistan’s plans for a billion-dollar mining deal with the Trump administration.

news.headline: Why does China portray India as an elephant? Decoding the politics of animal analogy
news.summary:
